headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.googletagmanager.com https://connect.facebook.net; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com 'unsafe-inline'; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://www.facebook.com https://www.googletagmanager.com; connect-src 'self' https://www.google-analytics.com https://www.facebook.com https://*.google-analytics.com https://*.analytics.google.com https://*.googletagmanager.com; frame-src https://www.googletagmanager.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
